subject: Mathematics
title: The Limits of Logic
description: A quick win: understand The Limits of Logic.

hook.text: Logic is the most powerful tool humans have invented for reasoning. But it has boundaries.

buildup.text: Godel showed math has unprovable truths. Turing showed some problems are undecidable.

discovery.text: Tarski proved that no formal system can define its own concept of truth—a logical blind spot.

twist.text: These limits aren't failures of logic—they're deep truths about what any formal system can achieve.

climax.text: Knowing the limits of logic is itself a triumph of logical reasoning. Logic mapped its own borders.

punchline.text: Logic's greatest achievement was discovering its own limits.

quiz.question: What did Turing prove about computation?
options: Some problems cannot be solved by any algorithm
All problems can be solved given enough time
